description_long: This house features a modern, flat-roofed design with clean, geometric lines and a predominantly white exterior. The structure is surrounded by lush landscaping, including several large flowering trees with pink and purple blossoms, which provide privacy and a natural aesthetic. At the center of the property is an open courtyard or patio area, partially covered by a pergola, with outdoor seating and a pool visible. The house includes multiple large windows, some floor-to-ceiling, allowing for ample natural light and views of the garden. A garage is attached to one side, and the overall layout is sprawling and single-story, emphasizing horizontal space. The architectural style is minimalist, with an emphasis on open, functional outdoor living spaces.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, white exterior, large windows, and a central courtyard surrounded by flowering trees. The design features a garage, pergola-covered patio, and extensive landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage, and central courtyard with pergola and pool, framed by flowering trees.
description_view_1: Rear view dominated by dense flowering trees, with the courtyard and patio area partially visible through the foliage.
description_view_2: Side view almost entirely obscured by trees, with only the roofline and some windows visible through the greenery.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, more of the flat roof, and the courtyard area, with trees partially concealing the structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with a flat overhang, large glass door, and no visible steps or decorative columns
